search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` EventCode=624 OR EventCode=4720 | eval Win2K8_acc = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1),TargetUserName, TargetUserName) | eval "Created_Account"=coalesce(Win2K8_acc,New_Account_Name) | timechart count by Created_Account

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` EventCode=630 OR EventCode=4726 | eval Win2K8_acc = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1),TargetUserName) | eval "Deleted_Account"=coalesce(Win2K8_acc,Target_Account_Name, TargetUserName) | timechart count by Deleted_Account

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` "EventCode=644" OR "EventCode=4740" | eval Win2K8_acc = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1),TargetUserName) | eval "Locked_Account"=coalesce(Win2K8_acc,Target_Account_Name, TargetUserName) | timechart count by Locked_Account

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` "EventCode=671" OR "EventCode=4767" | eval Win2K8_acc = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1),TargetUserName) | eval "Unlocked_Account"=coalesce(Win2K8_acc,Target_Account_Name, TargetUserName) | timechart count by Unlocked_Account

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=629" OR "EventCode=4725") | eval caller = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,0), Caller_User_Name, TargetUserName, SubjectUserName) | eval member = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1), Target_Account_Name, TargetUserName) | table _time member caller | rename _time AS Time caller AS "Account disabled by" member AS "Disabled Account" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` "EventCode=624" OR "EventCode=4720" OR "EventCode=630" OR "EventCode=4726" OR "EventCode=644" OR "EventCode=4740" OR "EventCode=671" OR "EventCode=4767" OR "EventCode=626" OR "EventCode=4722" OR "EventCode=629" OR "EventCode=4725" | eval Win28K_Acc = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1),TargetUserName) | eval Account = coalesce(Win28K_Acc,New_Account_Name,Target_Account_Name) | replace "624" with "ADDED User Account" in EventCode | replace "4720" with "ADDED User Account" in EventCode | replace "630" with "DELETED User Account" in EventCode | replace "4726" with "DELETED User Account" in EventCode | replace "644" with "LOCKED User Account" | replace "4740" with "LOCKED User Account" | replace "671" with "UNLOCKED User Account" in EventCode | replace "4767" with "UNLOCKED User Account" | replace "626" with "ENABLED User Account" in EventCode | replace "4722" with "ENABLED User Account" in EventCode | replace "629" with "DISABLED User Account" in EventCode | replace "4725" with "DISABLED User Account" in EventCode | timechart count by EventCode
